title: onobrychis heliocarpa
intro: Onobrychis heliocarpa, also known as the sainfoin plant, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. The health benefits of Onobrychis heliocarpa include its ability to support the immune system, improve digestion, and even help to regulate blood sugar levels. Onobrychis heliocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health enthusiasts.
